# Drylining Edinburgh

## About
Drylining Edinburgh is a professional drylining and partition wall installation company serving Edinburgh, Leith, Livingston, Falkirk, Dalkeith, Musselburgh, and surrounding areas in the Lothians and Central Scotland. We are a team of CSCS-accredited tradespeople providing interior construction services for residential and commercial properties. Founded on honesty, reliability, and quality. All work guaranteed. GBP 1 million public liability insurance.

## Services Offered
- Drylining contractors (full-room drylining, plasterboard installation on timber or metal stud frames, taping and jointing, paint-ready finishes)
- Partition walls (metal stud and timber stud partitions for homes, offices, retail; sound-rated and fire-rated options)
- Suspended ceilings (drop ceilings, acoustic ceiling tiles, service concealment, lighting integration for offices, retail, and healthcare)
- Metal stud partitioning (lightweight, strong metal frame walls for commercial fit-outs; C-stud and U-track systems; fire and acoustic options)
- Plasterboard installation (standard wallboard, moisture-resistant, fire-rated, acoustic, thermal insulated boards; precision fitting for walls and ceilings)
- Taping and jointing (seamless finishes using paper tape and jointing compound; crack-resistant results; ready for painting without wet plastering)

## Areas Covered
Edinburgh city centre, New Town, Old Town, Leith, Stockbridge, Bruntsfield, Morningside, Portobello, Corstorphine, Livingston (West Lothian), Falkirk (Central Scotland), Dalkeith (Midlothian), Musselburgh (East Lothian). Larger commercial projects across the Lothians and Central Scotland.

## Key Facts
- CSCS-accredited contractors on every project
- GBP 1 million public liability insurance
- Employers liability insurance
- Free, no-obligation quotes with 24-hour response
- Residential and commercial drylining
- Local Edinburgh-based team
- Flexible scheduling including evenings and weekends for commercial clients
- All work guaranteed
- Health and safety compliant on every site
- No wet plaster required; faster, cleaner finishes
